pr.title: Non-record: 11L Depth Recurrence + High-Yield Legal TTT (1.14458 BPB)

output.summary: Depth-recurrent 11-layer GPT reuses block cores, partial RoPE/value embeddings, and SGD-momentum score-first TTT that freezes early blocks for stronger legal adaptation.
output.valOnlyReasoning: Applies competition-legal score-first test-time training on validation chunks, adapting weights via SGD momentum after scoring each chunk.
techniques: Depth recurrence with per-layer norm scaling to reuse BlockCores
Partial RoPE plus deep-layer value embeddings for split position/content channels
SGD-momentum score-first TTT freezing early blocks for amplified adaptation
